## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GoodCall and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and platform updates.](https://fathom.video/share/Badyo_xR6bahTL9KhR5z6fNV2F3BQK6t?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [\~50 area code pages refreshed with updated content and metadata; focusing on search intent alignment and local relevance](https://fathom.video/share/Badyo_xR6bahTL9KhR5z6fNV2F3BQK6t?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
  - [New GrowthX platform (Atlas) demoed, featuring customizable dashboards pulling data from Search Console and GA4](https://fathom.video/share/Badyo_xR6bahTL9KhR5z6fNV2F3BQK6t?tab=summary&timestamp=1051.0)
  - [Shift in GoodCall's target audience from enterprise to SMB/single owner-operators; artifacts need updating](https://fathom.video/share/Badyo_xR6bahTL9KhR5z6fNV2F3BQK6t?tab=summary&timestamp=1326.0)
  - [Upcoming content refresh strategy to focus on agentic voice AI and aligning with GoodCall's current ICP](https://fathom.video/share/Badyo_xR6bahTL9KhR5z6fNV2F3BQK6t?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)

## Topics

### Content Refresh Progress

  - [\~47 area code pages updated out of \~1000 total](https://fathom.video/share/Badyo_xR6bahTL9KhR5z6fNV2F3BQK6t?tab=summary&timestamp=995.0)
  - [Two approaches tested:](https://fathom.video/share/Badyo_xR6bahTL9KhR5z6fNV2F3BQK6t?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)
    1)  Closely following original successful format
    2)  Adding information aligning with search intent and ICP
  - [Updates include recent data, broken link fixes, and locally-specific metadata](https://fathom.video/share/Badyo_xR6bahTL9KhR5z6fNV2F3BQK6t?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
  - [Some pages already re-indexed; showing as top-performing pages](https://fathom.video/share/Badyo_xR6bahTL9KhR5z6fNV2F3BQK6t?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)

### Performance Tracking and New Platform

  - [New GrowthX platform (Atlas) pulls data from Google Search Console and GA4](https://fathom.video/share/Badyo_xR6bahTL9KhR5z6fNV2F3BQK6t?tab=summary&timestamp=1083.0)
  - [Customizable dashboards track non-branded search performance and content cohort data](https://fathom.video/share/Badyo_xR6bahTL9KhR5z6fNV2F3BQK6t?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)
  - [Platform includes editable context artifacts (audience personas, company context, CTAs, writing guidelines)](https://fathom.video/share/Badyo_xR6bahTL9KhR5z6fNV2F3BQK6t?tab=summary&timestamp=1351.0)
  - [Future updates to include dropdown selections for mixing/matching personas and contexts](https://fathom.video/share/Badyo_xR6bahTL9KhR5z6fNV2F3BQK6t?tab=summary&timestamp=1490.0)

### Audience Shift and Strategy Alignment

  - [GoodCall pivoting from enterprise to SMB/single owner-operator focus](https://fathom.video/share/Badyo_xR6bahTL9KhR5z6fNV2F3BQK6t?tab=summary&timestamp=1334.0)
  - [Current artifacts (personas, company context) need updating to reflect new target audience](https://fathom.video/share/Badyo_xR6bahTL9KhR5z6fNV2F3BQK6t?tab=summary&timestamp=1422.0)
  - [Suggestion to create separate artifacts for enterprise vs. SMB content when needed](https://fathom.video/share/Badyo_xR6bahTL9KhR5z6fNV2F3BQK6t?tab=summary&timestamp=1422.0)
  - [Discussion on tailoring content style and focus (e.g., security, privacy, SOC 2, HIPAA for enterprise)](https://fathom.video/share/Badyo_xR6bahTL9KhR5z6fNV2F3BQK6t?tab=summary&timestamp=1455.0)

### Technical SEO Improvements

  - [Carrie to send Bob a 9KB disavow file to upload, addressing toxic backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/Badyo_xR6bahTL9KhR5z6fNV2F3BQK6t?tab=summary&timestamp=930.0)
  - [Potential for incorporating image generation into content workflow for improved visual relevance and SEO](https://fathom.video/share/Badyo_xR6bahTL9KhR5z6fNV2F3BQK6t?tab=summary&timestamp=762.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Bob to upload disavow file to improve site health and domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/Badyo_xR6bahTL9KhR5z6fNV2F3BQK6t?tab=summary&timestamp=989.0)
  - [GrowthX team to update company context artifact with more comprehensive information](https://fathom.video/share/Badyo_xR6bahTL9KhR5z6fNV2F3BQK6t?tab=summary&timestamp=1399.0)
  - [Create separate artifacts for enterprise vs. SMB audience segments](https://fathom.video/share/Badyo_xR6bahTL9KhR5z6fNV2F3BQK6t?tab=summary&timestamp=1422.0)
  - [Continue area code page refreshes, incorporating agentic voice AI mentions where relevant](https://fathom.video/share/Badyo_xR6bahTL9KhR5z6fNV2F3BQK6t?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
  - [Darrell to send Bob a Loom video demonstrating the new Atlas platform functionality](https://fathom.video/share/Badyo_xR6bahTL9KhR5z6fNV2F3BQK6t?tab=summary&timestamp=1594.0)
  - [Schedule next sync after July 4th holiday; maintain async updates in the interim](https://fathom.video/share/Badyo_xR6bahTL9KhR5z6fNV2F3BQK6t?tab=summary&timestamp=1614.0)
